name: Duration between rewards controls the rate of behavioral and dopaminergic learning
citation: Burke, Dennis (2026) Duration between rewards controls the rate of behavioral and dopaminergic learning (Version draft) [Data set]. DANDI Archive. https://dandiarchive.org/dandiset/001632/draft
description: Raw data (behavior + dopamine recordings) associated with paper: Burke DA, Taylor A, Jeong H, Lee S, Zsembik L, Wu B, Floeder JR, Naik GA, Chen R, Namboodiri VMK. Duration between rewards controls the rate of behavioral and dopaminergic learning. Nat Neurosci. 2026 doi: 10.1038/s41593-026-02206-2. PMID: 41680327 (https://www.nature.com/articles/s41593-026-02206-2). Scipts to run analyses located at: https://github.com/namboodirilab/duration_between_rewards_controls_learning_rate
